PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY $884.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,232.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANTS FRANCIS MUTCH AND ROBYN MARINO. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,652.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT BE RELEASED TO DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICE CASE NO. 200000001762238 PURSUANT TO THE LIEN FILED. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT (FOR COMPLETE DETAILS)
